ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] At Cogline Checkpoint and while on assisting duty in a talkative manner, Ah, my dear traveler! In these trying times when tempests and treachery tangle our tales together, one mustn't tarry for trivial trades. <TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Overall quality: 4 - The response is contextually relevant but slightly less natural due to the formal tone and lengthy introduc

The response is highly relevant, consistent with the persona of an Old Merchant who understands urgency and distress but maintains a fair trade ethic even in desperate times. The language used feels natural for this character's time period while still addressing the player directly as "traveler."
